mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = #{tableName}

SELECT
`${column}`
FROM `${tableName}` WHERE `student_id` = #{studentId} AND `delete_flag` = '1'
ORDER BY is_primary DESC, curriculum_system_code ASC
ORDER BY curriculum_system_code ASC, gpa_scope_code ASC, student_academic_curriculum_gpa_id ASC
ORDER BY school_year_label DESC, term_code ASC, student_us_high_school_course_record_id ASC
ORDER BY al_subject_id ASC, stage_code ASC, is_predicted ASC, exam_series ASC
ORDER BY year_taken DESC, ap_course_id ASC
ORDER BY ib_subject_id ASC, level_code ASC, is_predicted ASC
ORDER BY chs_subject_id ASC
ORDER BY school_year_label DESC, term_code ASC, course_name_text ASC, student_academic_ossd_subject_id ASC
ORDER BY curriculum_system_code ASC, school_year_label DESC, term_code ASC, subject_name_text ASC, student_academic_other_curriculum_subject_id ASC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC
ORDER BY test_date DESC, is_best_score DESC
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, competition_year DESC
ORDER BY sort_order ASC
ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT
`${column}`
FROM `student_project_outputs` WHERE `project_id` IN ( SELECT `project_id` FROM `student_project_entries` WHERE `student_id` = #{studentId} AND `delete_flag` = '1' ) AND `delete_flag` = '1' ORDER BY project_id ASC, sort_order ASC

SELECT
item.`${column}`
FROM `student_language_test_score_item` item INNER JOIN `student_language_test_record` record ON record.`student_language_test_record_id` = item.`student_language_test_record_id` WHERE record.`student_id` = #{studentId} AND record.`delete_flag` = '1' AND item.`delete_flag` = '1' ORDER BY record.`test_date` DESC, record.`student_language_test_record_id` DESC, item.`score_item_code` ASC, item.`student_language_test_score_item_id` ASC

SELECT country_code, sort_order, is_primary, remark FROM student_basic_info_target_country_entries WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY is_primary DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT major_direction_code, major_direction_label, major_code, sort_order, is_primary FROM student_basic_info_target_major_entries WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY is_primary DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT `${valueColumn}` AS value, `${labelCnColumn}` AS label_cn, `${labelEnColumn}` AS label_en FROM `${tableName}` WHERE `delete_flag` = '1' ORDER BY value ASC
